creator: david@dcrosstech.com
text: When attempting to enable the option for DANETAUSAGE on FreeBSD 12 it complains that it is broken on openssl < 1.1.1.  12 is now the default on 12.  I just comment out the BROKEN ;)  but I understand that isn't a portable solution until we stop supporting ports on non OpenSSL base 1.1.1 systems
